description: If buttonA is pressed (MouseDown emitted) and then the profile switches to one where buttonA maps to None, the translator never sees the release for that action. button_state[Left] stays true, MouseUp never fires. Fix: on config change, emit MouseUp for all buttons in button_state that are no longer mapped. Tests: press A (MouseDown), switch config to buttonA→None (MouseUp emitted), verify button_state cleared.
title: Profile switch with held buttons leaves mouse stuck
